recommendations.title: Keith
recommendations.overview: Natalie is high school royalty, but her queen bee status falls apart when she falls for the new guy at school. Although Keith ignores her at first, they soon become friends -- even though Natalie suspects that Keith has something to hide. As the free

recommendations.title: LOL Surprise: The Movie
recommendations.overview: Dazzling doll sisters Queen Bee and Royal Bee make their first movie with help from their fashionable friends in this one-of-a-kind magical adventure.

recommendations.title: Tamara
recommendations.overview: Tamara, an unattractive girl who is picked on by her peers, returns after her death as a sexy seductress to enact revenge.

recommendations.title: The Outcasts
recommendations.overview: After falling victim to a humiliating prank by the high school Queen Bee, best friends and world-class geeks, Mindy and Jodi, decide to get their revenge by uniting the outcasts of the school against her and her circle of friends.

recommendations.title: Banana Split
recommendations.overview: After a messy breakup with her high school boyfriend, April strikes up an unexpected friendship with his new girlfriend, Clara.

recommendations.title: Close Range Love
recommendations.overview: A smart high school student falls in love with her English teacher after she receives one-on-one tutoring from him.

recommendations.title: I Don't Want to Go Back Alone
recommendations.overview: The arrival of a new student in school changes Leonardo's life. This 15 year-old blind teenager has to deal with the jealousy of his friend Giovana while figuring out the new feelings he's having towards his new friend, Gabriel.

recommendations.title: Grand Hotel
recommendations.overview: Guests at a posh Berlin hotel struggle through worry, scandal, and heartache.

recommendations.title: School's Out
recommendations.overview: A few days before the baccalaureate, a high school student decides to settle accounts with the most cowardly teacher in the school.

recommendations.title: Confessions of an Invisible Girl
recommendations.overview: When the clever but socially-awkward Tetê joins a new school, she'll do anything to fit in. But the queen bee among her classmates has other ideas.
